title: ffi: load_identity_from_file TOCTOU on p.exists() check
description: ffi/src/api/identity.rs load_identity_from_file: calls p.exists() then fs::read(p). Between the two calls the file can be deleted or replaced, causing fs::read to fail with unexpected error rather than Ok(None). Fix: call fs::read directly and map ErrorKind::NotFound to Ok(None).
